file.import_markdown_prompt: Please select a Markdown file to import

toolbar.share_modal_tip: Send this URL to others. They can collaborate after opening it and signing in.

modal.new_document_confirm: Creating a new document will clear the current edit. Please confirm you have exported or backed up. Continue?
modal.delete_document_confirm: This action cannot be undone. Delete the current document?
modal.delete_owner_only_content: Only the original document creator is allowed to delete this document.

error.export_processor_not_found: No export processor found for key: {{key}}

auth.login_failed_check_credentials: Login failed, please check your credentials
auth.register_failed_try_later: Registration failed, please try again later
auth.login_prompt: Please log in to your account
auth.validation_password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.validation_password_mismatch: The two passwords do not match

landing.hero_lead: A quiet wiki and notes editor: write first, then sync with others or export when it is done.
landing.spotlight_title: Your wiki and notes, in one place
landing.spotlight_subtitle: Sign in to sync documents, collaborate in real time, and export when you need to.
landing.closing_subtitle: Sign in to create a document.
landing.feature_editor_desc: Structured blocks keep the page tidy so you stay with the text.
landing.feature_collab_desc: Share a link; everyone edits the same document with clear presence.
landing.feature_export_desc: DOCX, PDF, or Markdown when the draft should leave the app.

welcome.title: Welcome to NOTEDIT
welcome.subtitle: Start creating your first document, record ideas, thoughts and notes.
welcome.hint: Click the "Create" button in the toolbar to create a document.
